name: Kakkonto
benefit: Released-exterior formula for early cold with stiff neck and chills; famous first-choice cold remedy in Japan.
recipe: 2.5 g granules 3× daily at symptom onset.
sourcing: Tsumura, Kracie, and other major Kampo makers.

name: Shokenchuto
benefit: Warms middle jiao; pediatric abdominal pain, weak constitution.

name: Hochuekkito
benefit: Tonifies middle qi and raises yang; chronic fatigue, immune weakness.

name: Rikkunshito
benefit: Strengthens spleen, resolves phlegm; functional dyspepsia — extensively studied.
attribution: Japanese clinical trials in functional dyspepsia

name: Hangegeshinto
benefit: Harmonizes middle jiao; chronic gastritis, mouth ulcers from chemotherapy.

name: Kamishoyosan
benefit: Modified Xiao Yao San for menopausal symptoms — hot flashes, irritability.

name: Unkeito
benefit: Warms womb, regulates menstruation; irregular cycles, infertility with cold.

name: Tokishakuyakusan
benefit: Nourishes blood and resolves dampness; anemia, edema, menstrual pain.

name: Saikokaryukotsuboreito
latin: Chai Hu Jia Long Gu Mu Li Tang
benefit: Soothes shen, anchors yang; anxiety with palpitations and insomnia.

name: Yokukansan
benefit: Calms liver wind; researched for dementia-related behavioral symptoms.

name: Sansoninto
benefit: Classical insomnia formula; nourishes liver blood, calms shen.

name: Keishibukuryogan
benefit: Resolves blood stasis below; fibroids, endometriosis support.

name: Daikenchuto
benefit: Warms middle; postoperative ileus, cold abdominal pain. Researched in Japanese surgery.

name: Rikkosan
benefit: Classical oral/dental Kampo for mouth ulcers and gingivitis.
recipe: Dissolve 2.5 g granules in mouth 2–3× daily.

name: Maoto
benefit: Strong wind-cold release; early influenza with high fever and no sweat. Short-course only.
recipe: 2.5 g granules every 4 hr at symptom onset, max 3 days.
sourcing: Regulated — requires practitioner in many countries.

name: Bakumondoto
benefit: Moistens lung yin; chronic dry cough with tickly throat.

name: Shoseiryuto
benefit: Wind-cold with phlegm-fluids; classical allergy and asthma formula.

name: Saireito
benefit: Combines Xiao Chai Hu Tang and Wu Ling San; fevers with edema, nephritis adjunct.

name: Hachimijiogan
benefit: Tonifies kidney yang; cold lower back, urinary weakness, diabetes adjunct.

name: Rokumigan
benefit: Japanese version of Liu Wei Di Huang Wan; kidney yin tonic.

name: Bofutsushosan
benefit: Weight management; obesity with constipation.

name: Juzentaihoto
benefit: Tonifies qi and blood completely; post-illness recovery, cancer convalescence.

name: Ninjin'yoeito
benefit: Strong tonic for qi, blood, and spirit; deep fatigue with anemia.

name: Shakuyakukanzoto
benefit: Rapid muscle-cramp relief; only 2 herbs — peony and licorice.
recipe: 2.5 g granules at onset of cramp.

name: Orengedokuto
benefit: Clears fire-toxins; hypertension with red face, bleeding, infections.

name: Ryokeijutsukanto
benefit: Resolves phlegm-fluids; dizziness, vertigo, palpitations from dampness.

name: Tokakujokito
benefit: Breaks blood stasis with heat; stuck menstruation, constipation.
recipe: 2.5 g granules 2–3× daily. Avoid in pregnancy.

name: Shimotsuto
benefit: Classical blood-tonifying formula for women.

name: Seishinrenshiin
benefit: Clears heart fire, calms shen; UTIs with anxiety, chronic cystitis.

name: Choto-san
benefit: Clears liver wind; hypertension-related headaches, elderly vascular dementia adjunct.

name: Shimbuto
benefit: Warms yang, resolves water; chronic heart failure with edema, cold.

name: Goshuyuto
benefit: Warms stomach, subdues counterflow; migraine with vomiting.

name: Orento
benefit: Harmonizes upper-lower; gastritis with cold extremities.

name: Keishikajutsubuto
latin: Gui Zhi Jia Zhu Fu Tang
benefit: Warms channels, dispels wind-damp; chronic cold joint pain.

name: Tsumuraso
benefit: Reference to Tsumura, Japan's largest Kampo manufacturer — most RCT-studied.

name: Goreisan
benefit: Regulates body fluids; edema, headaches from fluid imbalance, motion sickness.

name: Jumihaidokuto
benefit: Classical skin-detox formula; eczema, furuncles, acute dermatitis.

name: Seijobofuto
benefit: Classical adult acne formula; clears heat from upper body.

name: Inchinkoto
benefit: Liver damp-heat and jaundice formula.

name: Shigyakusan
benefit: Releases liver qi stagnation with cold extremities; anxiety with IBS.

name: Toki Shakuyaku San (Dang Gui Shao Yao San)
benefit: See Tokishakuyakusan.

name: Shosaikoto
benefit: Harmonizes shao yang; alternating chills/fever, chronic hepatitis adjunct under supervision.
attribution: Japan MHLW warning re: interferon combination

name: Shofu Nagashi
benefit: Medicated bath with yuzu, ginger, and mugwort — winter-solstice tradition.
recipe: Whole citrus and herbs in bathwater for circulation and warmth.

name: Mugwort moxa (Mogusa)
benefit: Processed mugwort used in moxibustion; warms channels, dispels cold.

name: Umeboshi
benefit: Fermented salt-plum; digestive aid, alkalizing, antimicrobial against H. pylori.
recipe: 1 plum with rice or hot water at meals.

name: Kuzu
benefit: Culinary starch used in hot drinks for digestion and chills.
recipe: 1 tsp kuzu whisked into cold water, then heated with ginger until translucent.

name: Shiso leaf
benefit: Aromatic culinary herb; warming, stomach-settling, anti-allergic.
recipe: Fresh leaves with raw fish; or infusion.

name: Yuzu
benefit: Aromatic yuzu peel for circulation; yuzu baths at winter solstice.
recipe: Fresh fruit added whole to bath.

name: Wasabi (fresh)
benefit: Anti-microbial and digestive; fresh wasabi preferable to reconstituted pastes.

name: Ume-shoyo-kuzu
benefit: Umeboshi + shoyu + ginger + kuzu drink for colds and digestive chills.
recipe: 1 umeboshi + 1 tsp grated ginger + 1 tsp shoyu + kuzu starch in hot water.

name: Amazake
benefit: Rice koji-fermented; gentle gut microbiome food, natural energy.

name: Miso
benefit: Probiotic, isoflavone-rich; daily miso soup associated with lower breast cancer risk in Japanese studies.

name: Natto
benefit: Nattokinase supports circulation; rich in vitamin K2.

name: Matcha
benefit: L-theanine + catechins; calm focus and antioxidant support.
recipe: 1 tsp whisked in hot (not boiling) water; daily.

name: Hojicha
benefit: Low-caffeine roasted tea; evening-friendly, warming.
recipe: 1 tsp in hot water for 1 min.

name: Kombu
benefit: Mineral-rich kelp; iodine, thyroid support.
recipe: 1 strip in dashi broth; or 1 small piece daily.

name: Wakame
benefit: Mineral-rich seaweed; thyroid support, blood-lipid benefits.

name: Nori
benefit: Iodine- and vitamin B12-rich seaweed.

name: Hijiki
benefit: Iron-rich seaweed; caution — naturally concentrates arsenic.
sourcing: Japanese coast. UK FSA advises limiting.

name: Sesame (black)
benefit: Tonifies kidney and blood; traditional hair and longevity food.
